reasoning: The primary limiter we're tackling today is poor lactate clearance, which is evident from the 25W drop over 15 minutes in your power curve. Last ride was easier, setting you up perfectly to handle more intensity. By focusing on efforts mimicking the demands of the Sundance to Cascade Springs segment, you'll build the necessary fatigue resistance and clear lactate effectively to sustain power over longer climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (10 mins at 201-218W, then 5 mins at 242-256W) with 5 mins recovery in between

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
